title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Rescues Officer From Downed Fighter Jet in Iran, Trump Says
summary_full: The rescue followed a two-day race between U.S. and Iranian forces to reach the injured airman, officials said. On Saturday, Israel attacked Iran’s largest petrochemical industrial complex.
